calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-05-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Defendant/Judgment Debtor KIM M. TAM, Tel No. (415) 424-5433 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Mr. Tam did not notify the Plaintiff/Judgment Creditor of his intent to appear. The Court and Mr. Tam discussed Mr. Tam's claim of exemption. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR KIM M. TAM'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is denied without prejudice. No property is exempt from enforcement unless specifically made so by law; and courts may not increase statutory exemptions. (Estate of Brown (1899) 123 Cal. 399, 401.) CCP sec. 706.051, the statute that exempts property necessary for support, only applies to wage garnishment. Because this claim involves a bank levy, CCP sec. 706.051 does not apply. Thus, Defendant has not established a statutory exemption. Court shall prepare and serve a formal order on all parties. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)
